description: You are a molecular biologist studying amino acid biosynthesis. Analyze the E. coli tryptophan biosynthesis operon GenBank file at ~/UGENE_Data/ecoli_trp_operon/trp_operon.gb to identify the five structural genes: trpE, trpD, trpC, trpB, and trpA (considering ORFs of at least 200 bp using the standard bacterial genetic code). Translate these genes into protein sequences starting with Methionine and export them as individual FASTA files to ~/UGENE_Data/ecoli_trp_operon/results/ named trpE_protein.fasta, trpD_protein.fasta, trpC_protein.fasta, trpB_protein.fasta, and trpA_protein.fasta. Create a summary report at ~/UGENE_Data/ecoli_trp_operon/results/trp_operon_report.txt documenting the gene names, start/stop positions, protein lengths, total operon sequence length, total coding sequence length, and the coding density percentage.
